utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Hi !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Hey !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Joey , I gotta tell you , I have been thinking all day about that scene you did , I mean , you were amazing !

emotion_cause.span: 3_I have been thinking all day about that scene you did , I mean , you were amazing !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Oh , you know , the writing was good , and the director is good , and ... and my co ... star good . But they are not as good as me !

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: God , you have to tell me what happens tomorrow !

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Ow , I am just going over the script now ! You wanna read lines with me ?

utterances.text: Me ? Oh , no , I am not an actress .

utterances.speaker: Rachel

utterances.speaker: Joey
utterances.text: Right ... ok , so just from the top of the page , right here .

utterances.speaker: Rachel
utterances.text: Okay ... Hello Drake , I am surprised to see you here .

utterances.speaker: Joey/Drake
utterances.text: I can not believe you married him .

utterances.speaker: Rachel/actress
utterances.text: But what choice did I have . He was keeping my sister in a dungeon !

utterances.speaker: Joey/Drake
utterances.text: So what about us ? Everything we feel for each other .

utterances.speaker: Rachel/actress
utterances.text: It is over ! You have to accept that .

utterances.speaker: Joey/Drake
utterances.text: How can I ?

emotion_cause.span: 15_It is over ! You have to accept that .

utterances.text: Knowing I will never hold you in my arms again , or touch your skin , or feel your lips , knowing I will never make love to you ?
